All internal use statements updated (Grid\Foo → Components\Foo)
TD-1, TD-2, TD-6 fixed inline during moves

notes.td_fixes: TD-1: readonly constructor-promoted + clone-mutate fails. TD-2: Dual-state collections with withers need rebuildFiltered() helper. TD-6: Split inline secondary classes to own PSR-4 files.
notes.console_dual_state: Console keeps DUAL state: private array $entries (filtered view cache) AND private array $originalEntries (source of truth). withEntry() must mutate originalEntries, not entries.
notes.many_files: This is the largest namespace - 100+ files. May need to sub-divide if single task is too large.
